revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag_team%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} Displays a flag icon, country name, and country code in parentheses. The first input parameter is the three-letter country code, and the second (optional) parameter is the flag variant label, if necessary. This template is useful for sports results tables, for example, where country codes are often used to identify national teams. Use the optional code parameter when a country name is used to select the flag. ==Examples== {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|IRQ}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|SCO}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|GBR}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|CAN|1921}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}}}} ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template useful for individual names *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations *[[:en:List of IOC country codes|List of IOC country codes]] and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|List of FIFA country codes]] for some commonly used country codes {{Flag templates}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} Displays a flag icon, country name, and country code in parentheses. The first input parameter is the three-letter country code, and the second (optional) parameter is the flag variant label, if necessary. This template is useful for sports results tables, for example, where country codes are often used to identify national teams. Use the optional code parameter when a country name is used to select the flag. ==Examples== {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|IRQ}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|SCO}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|GBR}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|CAN|1921}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{flag team|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}}}} ==See also== *[[Template:Flag athlete]] for a similar template useful for individual names *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations *[[:en:List of IOC country codes|List of IOC country codes]] and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|List of FIFA country codes]] for some commonly used country codes {{Flag templates}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
